evidence: TASK-048 verified end-to-end; closes FGAP-077. update's blocked outcome carries the per-item validation diagnostic on BOTH paths: an additive UpdateResult.blockedDetail (name, reason no-migration-chain | validation-failed, the installed->catalog version pair, and per failing item {itemId, instancePath, keyword, message}) populated by simulateResyncOutcome's blocked arms (dry) and resyncSchema's now-bound catch (live, rollback byte-identical); blocked: string[] unchanged (zero existing assertions broken). itemIdForPath maps AJV instancePath /<arrayKey>/N to the item id with safe undefined on envelope-level errors, id-less items, and non-array keys; a non-ValidationError throw yields a String(err) fallback failure entry. The standalone validate-block-items op validates a named block's items against the catalog schema version and RETURNS the per-item failures (exit 0 + valid:false on validation failure; field-named throw + non-zero exit on unknown block or missing block file; never writes — substrate hash-identical before/after, probe-verified). renderBlocked (exported beside renderConflicts, keyword phrasing mirroring formatAjvError without a cross-package import cycle) surfaces the detail on the update CLI text surface beside the conflicts special-case; --json carries the structured field with no double-emit. Runtime demo on the R-0012 reproduction: dry AND live blockedDetail identically name CONV-001, /rules/0 required 'rationale' and /rules/0/enforcement enum, with from 1.0.0 to 1.0.1; pi-context validate-block-items --block conventions returns the same failure list; --block bogus exits 1 field-named. Dry/live detail divergence reasoned impossible (same schema bytes, same migration keying, same deduped registry edge set, deterministic AJV ordering) and asserted by deepEqual parity tests on both arms. build + check + full test fail 0 (all six packages); parity-check exit 0; examples-coverage + groupForOp drift-guard green (the op slotted in Read & query); the op appears in both regenerated SKILL.md tool tags (pi-bound allowlist). Docs synced usage-only: update op strings name blockedDetail; new op strings; READMEs gained the diagnostic clause preserving the TASK-046-corrected dry-run wording; CHANGELOG entries in pi-context, pi-context-cli, pi-project-workflows. Fresh adversarial probe PASS, zero defects; iterate-to-zero converged on the first pass.

criteria_results.evidence: blockedDetail + renderBlocked; the R-0012 demo names CONV-001 /rules/0 required + /rules/0/enforcement enum on dry, live, and the text surface
